name: Brisket with Prunes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Cut a piece of aluminum foil large enough to wrap the brisket.
3. Sprinkle half of the diced onions over the foil in a layer about the same size as the brisket.
4. Place the brisket over the onions.
5. Sprinkle the remaining onions over the top.
6. Seal tightly and place in a large shallow pan.
7. Roast for 3 hours.
8. Combine the beer with the remaining ingredients in a large saucepan and bring to boil over medium-high heat.
9. Remove from heat and discard the foil.
10. Spread the fruit mixture over the brisket.
11. Reduce oven temperature to 300 degrees F.
12. Cover the pan and continue roasting for 1 hour, adding more beer to the pan if the sauce appears too dry.
13. Transfer the brisket to a heated platter.
14. Surround with fruit and sauce.
